title: HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON REDMOND WORKSOURCE HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists veterans in reintegrating into the community and finding employment. A structured, individually designed case management plan may include skill sets such as financial literacy, computer training, job search training, and interview guidance. Veterans learn skills to retain employment and become financially independent. 2158 SE College Loop B Redmond, OR 97756 Eligibility: Must be homeless or at risk of homelessness (lacking a permanent address), or have been homeless within the last 20 days. Must have at least one day of active duty, must have any discharge other than a dishonorable discharge. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Get Directions Visit Website INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Military paperwork, DD214, ID AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Veteran Employment Programs Veteran Reintegration Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERSEALS OREGON REDMOND WORKSOURCE
